content.text:
I'm ready to help you with the Mileage Management System project. I can see we're in a fresh git repository with some initial files including a requirements document (RFQ.pdf) and a statement of work (sow-mileage-management-system.md).

What would you like me to do? I can help you with:
- Setting up the project structure
- Creating initial code scaffolding
- Reviewing the requirements
- Setting up dependencies
- Or any other development task

Just let me know what you'd like to work on.
